`


<!-- NAV -->
<nav id="main-nav" style="display:none">
  <div class="nav-in">
    <a class="nav-logo" onclick="navTo('home')">
      <img class="nav-logo-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="DentalShark Logo">
      <div class="nav-logo-text">
        <div class="nav-logo-name">Dental<span>Shark</span></div>
      </div>
    </a>
    <div class="nav-search-wrap" id="nav-search-desktop">
      <input id="nsi" class="nav-search-input" placeholder="Search products…" onkeyup="handleSK(event)" oninput="showSDrop()">
      <button class="nav-search-btn" onclick="doSearch()">🔍</button>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-links" id="nav-links-desktop">
      <span class="nl" onclick="navTo('home')">HOME</span>
      <span class="nl" onclick="navTo('shop')">SHOP</span>
      <span class="nl" onclick="navTo('ai')">AI SCANNER</span>
      <span class="nl" onclick="navTo('engineers')">ENGINEERS</span>
      <span class="nl" onclick="navTo('about')">ABOUT</span>
      <span class="nl" onclick="navTo('contact')">CONTACT</span>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-right">
      <div class="nav-timer" id="session-timer">⏱ 00:00:00</div>
      <button class="icon-btn nav-theme" onclick="toggleTheme()" title="Toggle Light/Dark Mode" id="theme-toggle">🌓</button>
      <button class="icon-btn nav-wishlist" onclick="openWishlist()" title="Wishlist">❤️<span class="badge" id="wl-badge" style="display:none">0</span></button>
      <button class="icon-btn nav-cart" onclick="openCart()">🛒<span class="badge" id="cart-badge">0</span></button>
      <button class="icon-btn" onclick="showNotifs()">🔔<span class="badge badge-red" id="notif-badge">3</span></button>
      <button class="icon-btn nav-pts" onclick="navTo('sharkpoints')" title="SHARK Points" style="color:var(--gold)">⚡<span class="badge" id="pts-badge" style="background:var(--gold);color:#000;display:none">0</span></button>
      <div id="nav-user-wrap"><button class="btn-signin" onclick="navTo('login')">SIGN IN</button></div>
      <button class="hamburger" id="nav-ham" onclick="openMobDrawer()">☰</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- Mobile Search Row -->
  <div id="mob-search-row" style="display:none; padding: 0 0 10px 0;">
    <div class="nav-search-wrap" style="margin-left:0; width:100%;">
      <input id="nsi-mob" class="nav-search-input" style="width:100%;" placeholder="Search products…" onkeyup="if(event.key==='Enter'){document.getElementById('nsi').value=this.value;doSearch()}">
      <button class="nav-search-btn" onclick="document.getElementById('nsi').value=document.getElementById('nsi-mob').value;doSearch()">🔍</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</nav>
<div id="search-drop"></div>

<!-- MOBILE DRAWER -->
<div class="mob-overlay" id="mob-overlay" onclick="closeMobDrawer()"></div>
<div class="mob-drawer" id="mob-drawer">
  <div class="mob-drawer-head">
    <span class="mob-brand">Dental<span>Shark</span></span>
    <button class="mob-close" onclick="closeMobDrawer()">×</button>
  </div>
  <input class="mob-search" id="mob-search" placeholder="🔍 Search products…" onkeyup="if(event.key==='Enter'){closeMobDrawer();document.getElementById('nsi').value=this.value;doSearch()}">
  
  <div id="mob-main-links">
    <button class="mob-link" onclick="closeMobDrawer();navTo('home')"><span class="mi">🏠</span>Home</button>
    <button class="mob-link" onclick="closeMobDrawer();navTo('shop')"><span class="mi">🛍️</span>Shop</button>
    <button class="mob-link" onclick="closeMobDrawer();navTo('ai')"><span class="mi">🤖</span>AI Scanner</button>
    <button class="mob-link" onclick="closeMobDrawer();navTo('engineers')"><span class="mi">🔧</span>Engineers</button>
    <button class="mob-link" onclick="closeMobDrawer();navTo('about')"><span class="mi">ℹ️</span>About</button>
    <button class="mob-link" onclick="closeMobDrawer();navTo('contact')"><span class="mi">📞</span>Contact</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Dynamic Dashboard Links (Visible only on Dashboard screen) -->
  <div id="mob-dash-links" style="display:none">
    <div class="mob-divider"></div>
    <div style="font-size:10px; font-weight:800; color:var(--teal); padding:10px 14px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1px">Dashboard Menu</div>
    <div id="mob-dash-inner"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="mob-divider"></div>
  <button class="mob-link" onclick="closeMobDrawer();openWishlist()"><span class="mi">❤️</span>Wishlist</button>
  <button class="mob-link" onclick="closeMobDrawer();openCart()"><span class="mi">🛒</span>Cart</button>
  <button class="mob-link" onclick="closeMobDrawer();showNotifs()"><span class="mi">🔔</span>Notifications</button>
  <button class="mob-link" onclick="closeMobDrawer();navTo('sharkpoints')" style="color:var(--gold)"><span class="mi">⚡</span>SHARK Points</button>
  <div class="mob-divider"></div>
  <div id="mob-user-wrap" style="margin-top:8px"></div>
</div>

<!-- BOTTOM NAV — 7 tabs including Cart and Shark Points -->
<nav id="bottom-nav">
  <button class="bn-item active" id="bn-home" onclick="navTo('home');setBN('home')"><span class="bn-ic">🏠</span><span>Home</span></button>
  <button class="bn-item" id="bn-shop" onclick="navTo('shop');setBN('shop')"><span class="bn-ic">🛍️</span><span>Shop</span></button>
  <button class="bn-item" id="bn-cart" onclick="openCart()"><span class="bn-ic">🛒</span><span>Cart</span><span class="bn-badge" id="bn-cart-badge">0</span></button>
  <button class="bn-item" id="bn-ai" onclick="navTo('ai');setBN('ai')"><span class="bn-ic">🤖</span><span>Scan</span></button>
  <button class="bn-item" id="bn-wl" onclick="openWishlist()"><span class="bn-ic">❤️</span><span>Wishlist</span><span class="bn-badge" id="bn-wl-badge" style="display:none">0</span></button>
  <button class="bn-item shark-pts" id="bn-pts" onclick="navTo('sharkpoints');setBN('pts')"><span class="bn-ic">⚡</span><span>Points</span></button>
  <button class="bn-item" id="bn-menu" onclick="openMobDrawer()"><span class="bn-ic">☰</span><span>Menu</span></button>
</nav>

<!-- ======================== LOGIN ======================== -->
<div id="login-screen" class="screen active">
  <div class="login-left">
    <div class="ll-grid"></div>
    <div class="ll-logo">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="DentalShark" style="width:130px;height:130px;object-fit:contain;display:block;margin:0 auto;filter:drop-shadow(0 20px 48px rgba(37,99,235,.45));image-rendering:-webkit-optimize-contrast">
      <div class="ll-brand">Dental<span>Shark</span></div>
      <div class="ll-tag">Where Every Smile Gets Its Edge</div>
      <div class="ll-ship">🚚 Free shipping across all 27 governorates</div>
    </div>
    <div class="ll-feats">
      <div class="lf"><div class="lf-ic" style="background:rgba(245,158,11,.15)">📦</div><span class="lf-t">500+ verified products from global dental brands</span></div>
      <div class="lf"><div class="lf-ic" style="background:rgba(168,85,247,.15)">🤖</div><span class="lf-t">AI Smart Scanner — panoramic X-ray diagnostics</span></div>
      <div class="lf"><div class="lf-ic" style="background:rgba(249,115,22,.15)">🚚</div><span class="lf-t">Fast delivery to all 27 Egyptian governorates</span></div>
      <div class="lf"><div class="lf-ic" style="background:rgba(78,204,163,.15)">🔧</div><span class="lf-t">Certified equipment repair by Eng. Mohamed Kotb</span></div>
      <div class="lf"><div class="lf-ic" style="background:rgba(245,158,11,.15)">⚡</div><span class="lf-t">SHARK Points — earn on every purchase</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="login-right">
    <div class="mobile-logo">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="DentalShark" style="width:90px;height:90px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:14px;image-rendering:-webkit-optimize-contrast">
      <div class="ml-brand">Dental<span>Shark</span></div>
      <div class="ml-tag">Egypt's #1 Dental Marketplace</div>
    </div>
    <h2>Welcome Back 👋</h2>
    <p>Sign in to your DentalShark account</p>
    <div class="role-tabs">
      <div class="rt active" onclick="setRole('dentist',this)"><div class="ri">🦷</div><div class="rl">Dentist</div></div>
      <div class="rt" onclick="setRole('vendor',this)"><div class="ri">🏪</div><div class="rl">Vendor</div></div>
      <div class="rt" onclick="setRole('student',this)"><div class="ri">🎓</div><div class="rl">Student</div></div>
      <div class="rt" onclick="setRole('admin',this)"><div class="ri">⚙️</div><div class="rl">Admin</div></div>
      <div class="rt" onclick="setRole('staff',this)"><div class="ri">👤</div><div class="rl">Staff</div></div>
      <div class="rt" onclick="setRole('engineer',this)"><div class="ri">🔧</div><div class="rl">Engineer</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ff"><label>EMAIL ADDRESS</label><input class="fi" id="lei" type="email" placeholder="Enter your email"></div>
    <div class="ff"><label>PASSWORD</label><div class="pw-wrap"><input class="fi" id="lpi" type="password" placeholder="Enter your password" style="padding-right:42px"><button class="pw-eye" onclick="togglePw()">👁</button></div></div>
    <div class="fex"><label><input type="checkbox" checked style="accent-color:var(--teal)"> Remember me</label><a onclick="handleForgotPw()">Forgot Password?</a></div>
    <button class="btn-login" onclick="doLogin()">Sign In →</button>
    <div class="social-row">
      <button class="social-btn" onclick="doLogin('google')">🅖 Google</button>
      <button class="social-btn" onclick="doLogin('apple')">🍎 Apple</button>
    </div>
    <div class="login-links">New here? <a onclick="openSignupModal()">Sign Up</a> · <a onclick="doLogin('guest')">Browse as guest</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SIGN UP MODAL -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="signup-modal">
  <div class="modal-box">
    <div class="modal-header"><h2>✨ Create Your Account</h2><button class="modal-close" onclick="closeSignupModal()">×</button></div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:20px">
        <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2)">Join 5,000+ dental professionals in Egypt</div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-row">
        <div><div class="form-lbl">FULL NAME</div><input id="su-name" class="form-input" placeholder="Dr. Ahmed Hassan"></div>
        <div><div class="form-lbl">ROLE</div><select id="su-role" class="form-select"><option value="Doctor">Dentist</option><option value="Vendor">Vendor</option><option value="Student">Student</option></select></div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:12px"><div class="form-lbl">EMAIL ADDRESS</div><input id="su-email" class="form-input" type="email" placeholder="dr.ahmed@clinic.eg"></div>
      <div style="margin-top:12px"><div class="form-lbl">PHONE (OPTIONAL)</div><input id="su-phone" class="form-input" type="tel" placeholder="+20 1XX XXX XXXX"></div>
      <div style="margin-top:12px"><div class="form-lbl">PASSWORD</div><input id="su-pw" class="form-input" type="password" placeholder="Min 8 chars: A-Z, a-z, 0-9, !@#$"></div>
      <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:6px;line-height:1.6">⚠️ Password must include: uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character</div>
      <div style="margin-top:18px">
        <button class="btn-login" onclick="doSignup()">Create Account →</button>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:14px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2)">By signing up, you agree to our Terms and Conditions</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ======================== HOME ======================== -->
<div id="home-screen" class="screen">
  <section class="hero">
    <div class="hero-grid"></div>
    <button class="hero-theme-toggle" id="hero-theme-toggle" onclick="toggleTheme()" style="display:none">🌓</button>
    <div class="hero-inner">
      <div class="hero-text">
        <div style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:14px;">
          <div class="free-ship-badge" onclick="toast('⏳ Offer ends in 02:45:30','info')" style="cursor:pointer"><span>🚚</span> Free shipping </div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.25);padding:5px 12px;border-radius:20px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#f87171">
            <span class="fb-bolt">⚡</span> <span id="hero-flash-timer">03:24:17</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <h1>EGYPT'S <span class="accent">#1</span><br>DENTAL<br>MARKETPLACE</h1>
        <p>Professional dental equipment, supplies & certified repair services — trusted by Egypt's leading clinics and over 5,000 dental professionals nationwide.</p>
        <div class="hero-btns">
          <button class="btn-primary" onclick="navTo('shop')">🦷 Browse Shop</button>
          <button class="btn-outline" onclick="navTo('engineers')">🔧 Book Repair</button>
          <button class="btn-outline btn-purple" onclick="navTo('ai')">🤖 AI Scanner</button>
        </div>
        <div class="shark-pts-hero" onclick="navTo('sharkpoints')" style="cursor:pointer; transition: 0.2s; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;" onmouseover="this.style.opacity='0.8'" onmouseout="this.style.opacity='1'">
          <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:26px;height:26px;background:var(--gold);color:#000;border-radius:50%;font-size:14px;font-weight:900;">⚡</span>
          <span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);">SHARK Points</span>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-stats">
          <div><div class="hs-num">500+</div><div class="hs-lbl">Products</div></div>
          <div><div class="hs-num">27</div><div class="hs-lbl">Governorates</div></div>
          <div><div class="hs-num">98%</div><div class="hs-lbl">Satisfaction</div></div>
          <div><div class="hs-num">10+</div><div class="hs-lbl">Yrs Exp</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-slideshow" id="hero-ss">
        <button class="slide-arrow s-prev" onclick="prevSlide()">&#8249;</button>
        <button class="slide-arrow s-next" onclick="nextSlide()">&#8250;</button>
        <div class="sdots" id="sdots"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <div style="background:var(--bg2);border-top:1px solid var(--b2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--b2)">
    <div class="sec">
      <div class="sec-head"><div><div class="sec-label">BROWSE</div><div class="sec-title">Shop by <span>Category</span></div></div><button class="btn-viewall" onclick="navTo('shop')">View All →</button></div>
      <div class="cat-grid" id="cat-grid"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="padding:56px 32px">
    <div class="flash-wrap">
      <div class="flash-head">
        <span style="font-size:28px">⚡</span>
        <h2>Flash <span style="color:var(--teal)">Deals</span></h2>
        <div class="flash-timer">
          <span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);margin-right:4px">Ends in:</span>
          <div class="ft-block"><div class="ft-num" id="fh">02</div><div class="ft-lbl">HRS</div></div>
          <div class="ft-sep">:</div>
          <div class="ft-block"><div class="ft-num" id="fm">45</div><div class="ft-lbl">MIN</div></div>
          <div class="ft-sep">:</div>
          <div class="ft-block"><div class="ft-num" id="fs">30</div><div class="ft-lbl">SEC</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="prod-grid" id="flash-grid"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="sec">
    <div class="sec-head"><div><div class="sec-label">TOP PICKS</div><div class="sec-title">Featured <span>Products</span></div></div><button class="btn-viewall" onclick="navTo('shop')">View All →</button></div>
    <div class="prod-grid" id="featured-grid"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- SHARK POINTS SECTION -->
  <div style="padding:0 32px 32px">
    <div class="shark-pts-section">
      <div class="sp-head">
        <span style="font-size:36px">⚡</span>
        <div>
          <h2>SHARK <span style="color:var(--gold)">POINTS</span></h2>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:3px">Earn points on every purchase — redeem for exclusive discounts</div>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-left:auto;text-align:center">
          <button onclick="navTo('sharkpoints')" style="padding:10px 22px;background:rgba(245,158,11,.15);border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.35);border-radius:9px;color:var(--gold);font-family:Inter,sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer">View My Points →</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="sp-cards">
        <div class="sp-card"><div class="sp-card-icon">🛒</div><div class="sp-card-title">Earn on Every Order</div><div class="sp-card-desc">Get 1 SHARK Point for every 10 EGP spent on any product</div><div class="pts-badge">⚡ 1 pt / 10 EGP</div></div>
        <div class="sp-card"><div class="sp-card-icon">🔧</div><div class="sp-card-title">Repair Bonus</div><div class="sp-card-desc">Earn double points on all equipment repair and service bookings</div><div class="pts-badge">⚡ 2× on repairs</div></div>
        <div class="sp-card"><div class="sp-card-icon">🎁</div><div class="sp-card-title">Redeem for Discounts</div><div class="sp-card-desc">Use 100 points to get 50 EGP off your next order</div><div class="pts-badge">⚡ 100 pts = 50 EGP</div></div>
        <div class="sp-card"><div class="sp-card-icon">👑</div><div class="sp-card-title">VIP Tiers</div><div class="sp-card-desc">Reach Gold or Platinum tier for exclusive deals and priority service</div><div class="pts-badge">⚡ Gold / Platinum</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:var(--bg2);border-top:1px solid var(--b2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--b2)">
    <div class="sec">
      <div class="sec-head"><div><div class="sec-label">OUR PEOPLE</div><div class="sec-title">Meet the <span>Team</span></div></div><button class="btn-viewall" onclick="navTo('about')">Full Team →</button></div>
      <div class="team-grid" id="team-home"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <footer>
    <div class="footer-grid">
      <div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;margin-bottom:4px">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:32px;height:32px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:7px;image-rendering:-webkit-optimize-contrast" alt="DentalShark">
          <span style="font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:#fff">Dental<span style="color:var(--teal)">Shark</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="free-ship-badge" onclick="toast('⏳ Offer ends in 02:45:30','info')" style="cursor:pointer"><span>🚚</span> Free shipping Egypt-wide on orders 500+ EGP</div>
        <p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.8;max-width:240px;margin-top:10px">Egypt's #1 dental equipment marketplace connecting clinics, doctors and vendors.</p>
        <div class="footer-pts" onclick="navTo('sharkpoints')" style="cursor:pointer; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; width:fit-content;" onmouseover="this.style.opacity='0.8'" onmouseout="this.style.opacity='1'">
          <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:24px;height:24px;background:var(--gold);color:#000;border-radius:6px;font-size:14px;font-weight:900;box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(245,158,11,0.3)">⚡</span>
          <span style="font-size:13px; font-weight:700; color:var(--gold); letter-spacing:0.5px;">SHARK Points</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="footer-col"><h4>Quick Links</h4><a onclick="navTo('shop')">Shop All</a><a>Flash Deals</a><a onclick="navTo('ai')">AI Scanner</a><a onclick="navTo('engineers')">Engineers</a><a onclick="openWishlist()">My Wishlist ❤️</a><a onclick="navTo('sharkpoints')">SHARK Points ⚡</a></div>
      <div class="footer-col"><h4>Support</h4><a onclick="navTo('contact')">Contact Us</a><a onclick="showInfo('faq')">FAQ</a><a onclick="showInfo('returns')">Returns</a><a onclick="showInfo('track')">Track Order</a><a onclick="showInfo('warranty')">Warranty</a></div>
      <div class="footer-col"><h4>Newsletter</h4><p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:9px">Exclusive deals and new products straight to your inbox.</p><div class="nl-form"><input placeholder="your@email.com"><button onclick="toast('✅ Subscribed!','success')">Subscribe</button></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-bottom"><span>© 2025 DentalShark. CEO & Admin: Eng. Ahmed Kotb. All Rights Reserved.</span><span>🦷 Made with precision in Egypt 🇪🇬</span></div>
  </footer>
</div>

<!-- ======================== SHOP ======================== -->
<div id="shop-screen" class="screen">
  <div class="shop-layout">
    <div id="shop-filter-toggle" onclick="document.querySelector('.shop-sidebar').classList.toggle('open')">
      <span>🍔</span> Filter Products
    </div>
    <div class="shop-sidebar">
      <div class="sb-label">CATEGORIES</div>
      <div id="shop-cats"></div>
      <div class="sb-label">BRANDS</div>
      <div id="shop-brands"></div>
      <div style="margin-top:20px;padding:14px;background:rgba(245,158,11,.08);border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.2);border-radius:10px">
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:6px">⚡ SHARK POINTS</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.6">Earn 1 point for every 10 EGP spent. <a onclick="navTo('sharkpoints')" style="color:var(--gold);cursor:pointer;font-weight:700">Learn more →</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="shop-main">
      <div class="shop-topbar">
        <div class="shop-search-wrap"><input id="shop-search" placeholder="Search products…" onkeyup="refreshShop()"><span class="si">🔍</span></div>
        <span class="shop-count" id="shop-count">10 products</span>
        <select class="shop-sort" id="shop-sort" onchange="refreshShop()"><option>Sort: Featured</option><option>Price: Low to High</option><option>Price: High to Low</option><option>Best Rated</option></select>
      </div>
      <div class="shop-grid" id="shop-grid"></div>
      <div id="shop-pagination" style="display:flex; justify-content:center; gap:8px; margin-top:24px; padding-bottom:40px;"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ======================== AI SCANNER ======================== -->
<div id="ai-screen" class="screen">
  <div class="ai-page">
    <div class="ai-hero-band">
      <div class="ai-badge">🔬 DIAGNOSTIC INTELLIGENCE</div>
      <h1>PANORAMIC <span>AI SCAN</span></h1>
      <p>Advanced tooth detection and X-ray analysis powered by machine learning. Get instant diagnostics and FDI-notation mapping with 98.2% accuracy.</p>
      <div class="ai-stats-row">
        <div><div class="as-num">98.2%</div><div class="as-lbl">Accuracy</div></div>
        <div><div class="as-num">1,248</div><div class="as-lbl">Scans Done</div></div>
        <div><div class="as-num">0.8%</div><div class="as-lbl">Error Rate</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ai-main-grid">
      <div class="ai-upload-panel">
        <div class="ai-upload-zone" onclick="document.getElementById('ai-file').click()">
          <input type="file" id="ai-file" accept="image/*,.dcm" onchange="handleAIFile(this)">
          <div class="auz-icon">📡</div>
          <h3>Upload X-Ray</h3>
          <p>Drop X-ray, OPG, or intraoral image<br>or click to browse</p>
          <div class="fmt-tags"><span class="fmt-tag">JPEG</span><span class="fmt-tag">PNG</span><span class="fmt-tag">DICOM</span><span class="fmt-tag">TIFF</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="ai-demo-zone">
          <div class="dz-icon">🦷</div>
          <p>Use our demo panoramic X-ray image to see AI analysis in action</p>
          <button class="btn-demo" onclick="runDemoAI()">▶ Start Demo Analysis</button>
        </div>
        <div class="ai-symptoms">
          <label>OR DESCRIBE SYMPTOMS</label>
          <textarea id="ai-txt" placeholder="e.g. Patient has sensitivity in upper left molar, dark spot visible on buccal surface, periodontal bleeding on probing at tooth 26…"></textarea>
          <div class="ai-sym-btns">
            <button class="btn-analyze" onclick="runSymptomAI()">▶ Analyze</button>
            <button class="btn-demo-scan" onclick="runDemoAI()">Demo Scan</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="ai-progress" id="ai-prog">
          <div class="ai-prog-label" id="ai-prog-lbl">🔬 Analyzing…</div>
          <div class="aipbar"><div class="aipfill" id="ai-fill" style="width:0%"></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="recent-scans">
          <div class="rs-label">RECENT SCANS</div>
          <div class="rs-item"><div class="rs-av">NH</div><div><div class="rs-name">Nada Hany</div><div class="rs-meta">Oct 24, 14:20 · Full Pan</div></div><span class="rs-arrow">›</span></div>
          <div class="rs-item"><div class="rs-av">MD</div><div><div class="rs-name">Mark Davies</div><div class="rs-meta">Oct 23, 09:15 · Bitewing</div></div><span class="rs-arrow">›</span></div>
          <div class="rs-item"><div class="rs-av">ER</div><div><div class="rs-name">Elena Rodriguez</div><div class="rs-meta">Oct 22, 18:45 · Periapical</div></div><span class="rs-arrow">›</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ai-results-panel" id="ai-results-panel">
        <h3>ANALYSIS RESULTS</h3>
        <div class="ai-empty" id="ai-empty">
          <div class="ai-empty-icon">🔬</div>
          <p>Upload a dental X-ray or use the demo scan to receive AI-powered analysis with treatment recommendations.</p>
          <div class="ai-cap-tags"><span class="ai-cap-tag">Caries Detection</span><span class="ai-cap-tag">Bone Loss</span><span class="ai-cap-tag">Treatment Plan</span><span class="ai-cap-tag">FDI Mapping</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="ai-dicom-row" onclick="toast('📁 DICOM browser opened')">
          <span style="font-size:24px">📁</span>
          <div class="ai-dicom-info"><h4>Upload DICOM Files</h4><p>Direct upload from Planmeca, Carestream & Sirona</p></div>
          <button class="btn-dicom">Browse</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ai-caps-section">
      <div class="ai-caps-label">TRAINED ON 500K+ DENTAL IMAGES</div>
      <div class="ai-caps-title">AI <span>CAPABILITIES</span></div>
      <div class="ai-caps-grid">
        <div class="ai-cap"><div class="ai-cap-icon">🦷</div><div class="ai-cap-name">Caries Detection</div><div class="ai-cap-desc">Identifies cavities at early, moderate, and advanced stages with 97.3% accuracy across all tooth surfaces.</div></div>
        <div class="ai-cap"><div class="ai-cap-icon">🦴</div><div class="ai-cap-name">Bone Loss Analysis</div><div class="ai-cap-desc">Measures alveolar bone levels and detects periodontal disease. Classifies Stage I–IV periodontitis.</div></div>
        <div class="ai-cap"><div class="ai-cap-icon">🔍</div><div class="ai-cap-name">Root Canal Assessment</div><div class="ai-cap-desc">Evaluates root morphology, canal curvature, and periapical pathology for endodontic planning.</div></div>
        <div class="ai-cap"><div class="ai-cap-icon">👑</div><div class="ai-cap-name">Restorative Planning</div><div class="ai-cap-desc">Recommends crown, inlay, onlay, or direct filling based on cavity size and remaining structure.</div></div>
        <div class="ai-cap"><div class="ai-cap-icon">📊</div><div class="ai-cap-name">FDI Tooth Mapping</div><div class="ai-cap-desc">Real-time numbering of all 32 teeth using FDI notation. Detects missing, impacted and supernumerary teeth.</div></div>
        <div class="ai-cap"><div class="ai-cap-icon">📄</div><div class="ai-cap-name">Annotated PDF Report</div><div class="ai-cap-desc">Full clinical report with annotated X-ray, findings, treatment priority list, and EGP cost estimates.</div></div>
        <div class="ai-cap"><div class="ai-cap-icon">🎯</div><div class="ai-cap-name">Treatment Priority</div><div class="ai-cap-desc">Ranks conditions by urgency (Emergency/Urgent/Routine) with prioritized treatment timeline.</div></div>
        <div class="ai-cap"><div class="ai-cap-icon">🛒</div><div class="ai-cap-name">Smart Product Match</div><div class="ai-cap-desc">Links each diagnosis to exact DentalShark catalog products — right files for RCT, right composite shade.</div></div>
        <div class="ai-cap"><div class="ai-cap-icon">📡</div><div class="ai-cap-name">DICOM Integration</div><div class="ai-cap-desc">Direct upload from digital X-ray systems. Supports Planmeca, Carestream, and Sirona formats.</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="ai-disclaimer"><span style="font-size:16px;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px">⚠️</span><span><b>Medical Disclaimer:</b> DentalShark AI is a clinical support tool. All diagnoses must be confirmed by a licensed dental professional. Not for sole clinical decision-making.</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="engineers-screen" class="screen">
  <div class="eng-page">
    <div class="eng-hero">
      <div class="eng-hero-inner">
        <div class="eng-badge">🔧 Certified Dental Equipment Engineer</div>
        <h1>DENTAL EQUIPMENT<br><span>REPAIR & SERVICE</span></h1>
        <p>All brands serviced by <strong style="color:var(--teal)">Eng. Mohamed Kotb</strong> — KaVo, NSK, W&H, Planmeca & more. Full warranty on all repairs. Same-day emergency service available.</p>
        <div class="eng-tags">
          <span class="eng-tag">👨‍🔧 Eng. Mohamed Kotb</span>
          <span class="eng-tag">⭐ 4.9/5 Rating</span>
          <span class="eng-tag">🏆 10+ Years</span>
          <span class="eng-tag" style="color:var(--teal);cursor:pointer" onclick="toast('📞 Calling +20 100 123 4567')">📞 +20 100 123 4567</span>
          <span class="eng-tag" style="color:var(--gold)">⚡ Earn SHARK Points on repairs</span>
        </div>
        <div class="eng-av-float"><div class="eng-av-circle">🔧</div><div class="eng-av-name">ENG. KOTB</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="sec" style="max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:56px 32px">
      <div><div class="sec-label">SERVICES</div><div class="sec-title" style="margin-bottom:24px">What We <span>Service</span></div></div>
      <div class="svcs-grid" id="svcs-grid"></div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:0 32px 72px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto">
      <div class="booking-form">
        <h3>📅 Book a Service Appointment</h3>
        <div class="form-row">
          <div><div class="form-lbl">CLINIC NAME</div><input class="form-input" id="bk-clinic" placeholder="Hassan Dental Center"></div>
          <div><div class="form-lbl">DOCTOR NAME</div><input class="form-input" id="bk-doctor" placeholder="Dr. Ahmed Hassan"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-row">
          <div><div class="form-lbl">PHONE</div><input class="form-input" id="bk-phone" placeholder="+20 1xx xxx xxxx"></div>
          <div><div class="form-lbl">GOVERNORATE</div><select class="form-select"><option>Alexandria</option><option>Cairo</option><option>Giza</option><option>Port Said</option><option>Suez</option><option>Luxor</option><option>Aswan</option><option>Mansoura</option><option>Tanta</option><option>Ismailia</option></select></div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-row" style="margin-bottom:12px">
          <div><div class="form-lbl">EQUIPMENT TYPE</div><select class="form-select"><option>Handpiece / Turbine</option><option>Dental Unit / Chair</option><option>X-Ray Unit</option><option>Autoclave / Sterilizer</option><option>Air Compressor</option><option>Suction Unit</option><option>Scaler / Piezo</option></select></div>
          <div><div class="form-lbl">URGENCY</div><select class="form-select"><option>Normal (3–5 days)</option><option>Urgent (1–2 days)</option><option>Emergency (Same day)</option></select></div>
        </div>
        <div><div class="form-lbl">ISSUE DESCRIPTION</div><textarea class="form-textarea" placeholder="Describe the problem in detail…"></textarea></div>
        <button class="btn-book" onclick="submitBooking()">Book Appointment →</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ======================== CONTACT ======================== -->
<div id="contact-screen" class="screen">
  <div class="contact-page">
    <div class="contact-hero">
      <div style="position:relative;z-index:1">
        <div style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;border:1px solid rgba(78,204,163,.3);color:var(--teal);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:5px 14px;border-radius:20px;margin-bottom:14px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.5px">📞 GET IN TOUCH</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:56px;color:#fff;letter-spacing:3px;line-height:1;margin-bottom:10px">CONTACT <span style="color:var(--teal)">US</span></div>
        <p style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text2);max-width:500px;margin:0 auto;line-height:1.7">Have questions about products, repairs, or your order? Our team is ready to help you within 24 hours.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-grid">
      <div>
        <div class="sec-label" style="margin-bottom:6px">SEND A MESSAGE</div>
        <div class="sec-title" style="margin-bottom:18px;font-size:28px">We'd Love to <span>Hear From You</span></div>
        <div class="booking-form" style="max-width:100%">
          <div class="form-row">
            <div><div class="form-lbl">YOUR NAME</div><input class="form-input" id="ct-name" placeholder="Dr. Ahmed Hassan"></div>
            <div><div class="form-lbl">EMAIL</div><input class="form-input" id="ct-email" type="email" placeholder="dr.ahmed@clinic.eg"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-row">
            <div><div class="form-lbl">PHONE</div><input class="form-input" id="ct-phone" placeholder="+20 1xx xxx xxxx"></div>
            <div><div class="form-lbl">SUBJECT</div>
              <select class="form-select" id="ct-subject"><option>Product Inquiry</option><option>Order Support</option><option>Equipment Repair</option><option>Partnership / Vendor</option><option>Technical Support</option><option>Other</option></select>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-bottom:13px"><div class="form-lbl">MESSAGE</div><textarea class="form-textarea" id="ct-msg" placeholder="How can we help you…" style="min-height:120px"></textarea></div>
          <button class="btn-book" style="width:100%;padding:12px;font-size:14px" onclick="submitContact()">📩 Send Message</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="sec-label" style="margin-bottom:6px">REACH US DIRECTLY</div>
        <div class="sec-title" style="margin-bottom:18px;font-size:28px">Contact <span>Information</span></div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:11px;margin-bottom:20px">
          <div class="contact-info-card" onclick="toast('📞 Calling...','info')"><div class="ci-ic">📞</div><div><div class="ci-title">Phone</div><div class="ci-val">+20 100 123 4567</div><div class="ci-sub">Sun–Thu 9AM–6PM</div></div></div>
          <div class="contact-info-card" onclick="toast('📧 Opening email','info')"><div class="ci-ic">📧</div><div><div class="ci-title">Email</div><div class="ci-val">info@dentalshark.eg</div><div class="ci-sub">Reply within 24h</div></div></div>
          <div class="contact-info-card" onclick="toast('💬 Opening WhatsApp','info')"><div class="ci-ic">💬</div><div><div class="ci-title">WhatsApp</div><div class="ci-val">+20 100 123 4567</div><div class="ci-sub">Quick responses</div></div></div>
          <div class="contact-info-card"><div class="ci-ic">📍</div><div><div class="ci-title">Address</div><div class="ci-val">Alexandria, Egypt</div><div class="ci-sub">All 27 Governorates</div></div></div>
        </div>
        <div style="background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--b2);border-radius:12px;padding:18px">
          <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.5px;margin-bottom:12px">DIRECT CONTACTS</div>
          <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;border:1px solid var(--b2);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s" onclick="openProfileModal('owner')" onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='var(--teal)'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='var(--b2)'">
              <div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:9px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1d4ed8,#3b82f6);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0">AK</div>
              <div style="flex:1"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#fff">Eng. Ahmed Kotb</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--teal);font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px">CEO & Admin</div></div>
              <button style="padding:6px 11px;background:var(--teal);border:none;border-radius:7px;color:#000;font-family:Inter,sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer" onclick="event.stopPropagation();toast('Calling CEO…','info')">Call</button>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;border:1px solid var(--b2);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s" onclick="navTo('engineers')" onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='var(--teal)'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='var(--b2)'">
              <div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:9px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#a855f7);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0">MK</div>
              <div style="flex:1"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#fff">Eng. Mohamed Kotb</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#c084fc;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px">Head Engineer</div></div>
              <button style="padding:6px 11px;background:rgba(168,85,247,.2);border:1px solid rgba(168,85,247,.4);border-radius:7px;color:#c084fc;font-family:Inter,sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer" onclick="event.stopPropagation();navTo('engineers')">Book Repair</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ======================== ORDER CONFIRM ======================== -->
<div id="confirm-screen" class="screen">
  <div class="confirm-page">
    <div style="max-width:600px;width:100%;text-align:center">
      <div style="width:80px;height:80px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--teal),var(--teal2));border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:36px;margin:0 auto 20px;box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(78,204,163,.15),0 0 0 16px rgba(78,204,163,.07);color:#000;font-weight:700">✓</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:44px;color:#fff;letter-spacing:3px;margin-bottom:6px">ORDER CONFIRMED!</div>
      <p style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:8px">Your order has been placed successfully. We will process it shortly.</p>
      <div style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:rgba(245,158,11,.12);border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.25);border-radius:20px;padding:5px 14px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:22px" id="pts-earned-msg">⚡ You earned SHARK Points on this order!</div>
      <div style="background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--b2);border-radius:16px;padding:22px;margin-bottom:20px;text-align:left">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:14px;padding-bottom:12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--b2)">
          <div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:3px">ORDER NUMBER</div><div style="font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:22px;color:var(--teal);letter-spacing:1px" id="conf-ordnum">#DS-00001</div></div>
          <div style="text-align:right"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:3px">EST. DELIVERY</div><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#fff" id="conf-eta">3–5 business days</div></div>
        </div>
        <div id="conf-items"></div>
        <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--b2);padding-top:9px;margin-top:5px">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:3px"><span>Subtotal</span><span id="conf-sub">EGP 0</span></div>
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:7px"><span>Shipping</span><span>EGP 150</span></div>
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:15px;font-weight:800;color:#fff"><span>Total</span><span id="conf-tot" style="color:var(--teal)">EGP 150</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
        <button class="btn-primary" onclick="navTo('shop');cart=[];updateBadges()">🛍️ Continue Shopping</button>
        <button class="btn-outline" onclick="showInfo('track');setTimeout(()=>{const ti=document.getElementById('track-input');if(ti&&lastTrackingId){ti.value=lastTrackingId;trackOrder(lastTrackingId);}},150)">📦 Track Order</button>
        <button class="btn-outline" onclick="window.open('https://wa.me/201001234567?text='+encodeURIComponent('Hi DentalShark! I need an invoice for order: '+document.getElementById('conf-ordnum').textContent),'_blank')">📄 Request Invoice</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- MODALS -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="profile-modal">
  <div class="modal-box"><div class="modal-header"><h2 id="modal-title">Profile</h2><button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal()">×</button></div><div class="modal-body" id="modal-body"></div></div>
</div>
<div class="modal-overlay" id="notif-modal">
  <div class="modal-box"><div class="modal-header"><h2>🔔 Notifications</h2><button class="modal-close" onclick="document.getElementById('notif-modal').classList.remove('show')">×</button></div><div class="modal-body" id="notif-body"></div></div>
</div>

<!-- CART -->
<div class="cart-sidebar" id="cart-sidebar">
  <div class="cart-head"><h2>🛒 Your Cart</h2><button class="cart-close" onclick="closeCart()">×</button></div>
  <div id="cart-items"></div>
  <div class="cart-total">
    <div class="cart-row"><span>Subtotal</span><span id="cart-sub">EGP 0</span></div>
    <div class="cart-row"><span>Shipping</span><span>EGP 150</span></div>
    <div class="cart-row big"><span>Total</span><span id="cart-tot">EGP 150</span></div>
    <div class="cart-pts-earn" id="cart-pts-earn"><span>⚡</span><span id="cart-pts-text">Earn 0 SHARK Points on this order</span></div>
    <div style="margin:10px 0"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:6px">Payment Method</div><select id="pay-method" class="form-select" style="width:100%;padding:8px 12px;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--b2);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text);font-family:Inter,sans-serif;font-size:12px"><option value="COD">💵 Cash on Delivery</option><option value="Card">💳 Credit / Debit Card</option><option value="Wallet">📱 E-Wallet (Vodafone Cash)</option><option value="InstaPay">🏦 InstaPay Bank Transfer</option></select></div>
    <button class="btn-checkout" onclick="doCheckout()">Checkout Now →</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- TOAST -->
<div id="toast"><span id="toast-icon">✅</span><span id="toast-msg">Done!</span></div>
<!-- INFO SCREEN -->
<div id="info-screen" class="screen">
  <div style="padding-top:var(--nav-h);min-height:100vh;background:var(--bg)">
    <div style="background:var(--bg2);padding:48px 32px;text-align:center;border-bottom:1px solid var(--b2)">
      <div id="info-icon" style="font-size:48px;margin-bottom:14px">❓</div>
      <h1 id="info-title" style="font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:48px;color:#fff;letter-spacing:2px">Support</h1>
    </div>
    <div class="sec" id="info-body" style="max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;line-height:1.8;color:var(--text2)">
      <!-- Content injected by JS -->
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

`
